code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(p)
      match string.parse_int(p)
      when Some(n)
        nums = list.push(nums, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut result = ""
  mut cur = 0
  mut started = false
  mut j = 0
  while j < nums.len()
    match nums.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if not started
        cur = v
        started = true
      else if v > cur
        cur = v
      end
      if j == 0
        result = "#{cur}"
      else
        result = "#{result} #{cur}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(result)
when None
  println("")
end
